title: cyclosorus riparius
intro: Cyclosorus riparius, also known as the river fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus riparius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is often prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and its leaves can be dried and powdered for use in various herbal preparations.
